query: What demand charges apply to commercial customers with demand >500 kW in Chicago, based on the OpenEI tariffs data? Answer should contain service class name and demand charge for at least 2 classes
final_answer:
Assumption: Chicago commercial service is served by **Commonwealth Edison Co. (ComEd)**; I used OpenEI IURDB active, approved commercial tariffs for **233 S Wacker Dr, Chicago, IL 60606**. “Demand charge” below is the OpenEI `flatdemandstructure` rate, in `$/kW-month`.

| Service class name | Applicability note from OpenEI | Demand charge |
|---|---:|---:|
| **RDS-Large Load Delivery Class (Secondary)** | Commercial, secondary voltage, delivery service | **$14.58/kW-month** |
| **BES-Large Load Delivery Class (Secondary)** | Commercial, secondary voltage, delivery with standard offer | **$14.58/kW-month** |
| **RDS-Very Large Load Delivery Class (Secondary)** | Commercial, secondary voltage; OpenEI lists `peakkwcapacitymin: 1000` | **$13.10/kW-month** |
| **BES-Very Large Load Delivery Class (Secondary)** | Commercial, secondary voltage; OpenEI lists `peakkwcapacitymin: 1000` | **$13.10/kW-month** |
| **RDS-Medium Load Delivery Class (Primary)** | Commercial, primary voltage; OpenEI lists max demand up to 10,000 kW | **$8.90/kW-month** |
| **RDS-Medium Load Delivery Class (Secondary)** | Commercial, secondary voltage; OpenEI lists max demand up to 10,000 kW | **$14.94/kW-month** |

Source: OpenEI Utility Rate Database via `get_utility_tariffs`, sector=`Commercial`, address=`233 S Wacker Dr, Chicago, IL 60606`, active_only=`true`, approved=`true`; utility returned: **Commonwealth Edison Co**, EIA ID **4110**.

**Calculating demand charges**

I need to determine the demand charge using the rate from the flat demand structure. I have to compare rates between RDS and BES as they have the same demand charges. I’m considering using OpenEI’s data for commercial tariffs specific to a location. Since the user's demand is over 500, it seems that Large Load Delivery Class will likely apply.
